thought.text: 我将查看 Task3 配置和核心源码。

action.command:
sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/config.cmake; printf '
--- CMake ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/CMakeLists.txt; printf '
--- asg.hpp ---

--- EmitIR.hpp ---

--- EmitIR.cpp ---
'; sed -n '1,420p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/config.cmake; printf '\\n--- CMake ---\\n'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/CMakeLists.txt; printf '\\n--- asg.hpp ---\\n'; sed -n '1,420p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/asg.hpp; printf '\\n--- EmitIR.hpp ---\\n'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.hpp; printf '\\n--- EmitIR.cpp ---\\n'; sed -n '1,420p' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect task3 IR generation source"}
